creator: nox@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Can you please provide more details, like what guest(s) you tried, 
whether dhcp was successful, etc. 
Also, make sure the first dns you have in your host's /etc/resolv.conf 
works, since that is what qemu forwards the address it gives as dns 
to guests to (10.0.2.3.)
